title: Villager Butcher House
description: Adds a Villager Butcher House to the world
body:
### Villager Butcher House
**This mod adds a Villager Butcher House to the game, featuring butcher villagers inside the new house.**

![Butcher](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3f4892b8b382f60c07b23e1a4b74cc64d910363b.jpeg)

You’ll also find butcher themed loot throughout the structure, along with a small animal pen attached to the side of the house.

![Inside](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/abb2662524ff3c93cae576db8c52776c25e1040a.jpeg)


The Villager Butcher House can spawn in the Plains and Sunflower Plains biomes.

![upstairs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b0245c3211dfdeb523cda0435a112485047d94d2.jpeg)

Feel free to use this mod in your modpack
